title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Momonosuke, Unknown person #13, Yamato, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano will be led by me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My deepest apologies for the delay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...where Warriors can finally rest their blades--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A MAN, 8 YEARS OF AGE, SURVEYS THEIR PROGRESS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as they drift in the night air of the renowned land of Samuel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but he compensates with his devotion to duty and boundless compassion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: --This man will one day be known far and wide as one of Wano's greatest leaders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have just borne witness to the birth of the great Shogun, Kozuki MOMONOSURE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway!! I'll be sailing with you from now on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you can call me YAMATO! Nice to meet you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll need to get confirmation from the captain before I'll be convinced.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
